form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 4/5 on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Ubiquitous beaten 6 lengths (22.95). Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Ballarat (22.46) in a Free For All, finishing a 7 length fourth. Yet to win but has placed six times from this draw. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 4/5 on April 8 over 390m at Ballarat behind Blackpool Finn beaten 5.5 lengths (22.67). Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Impressive performance leading throughout to post a big 3.5 lengths victory in a R/A FIN last start at Ballarat, clocking a brilliant 21.98 for the 390m trip. Harder here but will be in this for a long way.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at Horsham when a 3 length second but did clock a hot 23.19 for the 410m trip. Hard to top with a repeat of that run.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (24.11) at big odds over 425m at Bendigo. Has to overcome a wide draw and needs to find best form to feature.
